arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest face Premier League leaders Liverpool tonight in what promises to be an intriguing clash. Forest remain the only team to beat Liverpool in the league this season after they won 1-0 at Anfield back in September. The Tricky Trees overcame Luton Town in the FA Cup on the weekend with a 2-0 victory […] The post Nottingham Forest vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest pushing hard to try and sign player with £83m release clause
Liverpool Transfer News: Reds close in on £25m Stefanos Tzimas deal
arts.sum: Liverpool have taken the next step in their pursuit of Stefanos Tzimas as the Premier League club looks to complete a deal for the highly-rated Greek forward. It is believed Hunter will help negotiations as Liverpool look to wrap up a deal for the teenager.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Darwin Nunez offer 'rejected' amid interest from former manager
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly reject a mammoth offer from a Saudi Pro League club who are interested in signing Darwin Nunez.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool & Arsenal also monitoring €80m Man City transfer target
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal are also monitoring the situation of Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush as Manchester City work on a potential €80m deal. arts.ttl: 'That doesn't happen' - Nuno Santo hits back at Arne Slot spending claim before huge Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Arne Slot suggested Nottingham Forest had spent their way to success this season ahead of their clash with Liverpool on Tuesday night.
